project_type: TypeScript monorepo - quant-live package for real-time voice AI pipeline
build_system: pnpm workspace with tsc (composite project references)
test_framework: vitest with globals:true, describe/it/expect/vi from vitest
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live test (all tests pass). 2. Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live typecheck (no TS errors).
setup_instructions: Already set up - pnpm store and node_modules present, tests green (107 tests passing)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. Node v22, pnpm available. No real browser APIs - all tests must mock getUserMedia/getDisplayMedia/canvas.
contribution_requirements: <=500 LOC per PR. All gates must pass (typecheck + test). Commit message format: feat(quant-live): add camera/screen capture with multimodal grounding
key_patterns: Each subsystem has its own directory under src/ (asr/, tts/, llm/, conversation/, core/). Types are centralized in src/types.ts. Tests live in src/__tests__/. Provider pattern: interface in types.ts, implementation in directory. Pipeline (core/pipeline.ts) orchestrates providers. Exports go through src/index.ts. Files use .js extension in imports (ESM). Tests use vi.fn() for mocks, create mock factory functions at top of test files.
directory_structure: packages/quant-live/src/ contains: core/ (pipeline, session-manager, latency-tracker), asr/ (whisper, vad, adaptive-vad, streaming-asr), tts/ (elevenlabs, kokoro, factory, prefetch-buffer), llm/ (streaming-llm, quant-ai-provider, tool-bridge, sentence-splitter), conversation/ (turn-manager, transcript), __tests__/ (15 test files), types.ts, index.ts
